harnessSourceManifest.recordFormat: relativePath + NUL + bytes + NUL + sourceSha256 + LF

graphProfile.linkValidatorBoundary: The link-check profile used by public CI enables starlight-links-validator. Its rehype plugin writes a globalThis Map that remains worker-local under ParallelPlugin and cannot currently be merged into the coordinator state.

included: project-local server-side JS, TS, TSX, JSON, MDX, and Astro imports
raw imports as exact string modules
local CSS and asset imports as internal leaf modules
excluded: Astro compiler CSS virtual modules and CSS dependency traversal
Astro hoisted and client script modules
route rendering and final asset emission
